description: Use this API to estimate the severity of designated single element outage contingencies and builds a contingency description data file with contingencies specified in decreasing order of their estimated severities. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = rank_brn_and_mac(sid, all, ival, rval, ssfile, mnfile, accfile)
python_syntax: ierr = rank_brn_and_mac(sid, all, ival, rval, ssfile, mnfile, accfile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying ranking options. (input).

parameters.name: rval
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying ranking parameters. (input).

parameters.name: ssfile
parameters.description: Name of the subsystem description file, or blank for no subsystem. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: mnfile
parameters.description: Name of the monitored element description file (if ival(2) > 0 (i.e., if the branch outage overload ranker is enabled) or if ival(8) > 0 (i.e., if the machine outage overload ranker is enabled) ). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: accfile
parameters.description: Name of the contingency description data file, or blank for output to the progress window. (input; blank by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

ival.description: allow ties from specified subsystem as contingencies (0 by default).
number of branch contingencies from overload ranking to include (>= 0) (0 by default).
rating set (1=RATEA, 2=RATEB, 3=RATEC) (rating set program option setting by default).
convert ratings to estimated MW ratings (0 by default).
number of voltage depression contingencies to include (>=0) (0 by default).
code indicating the set of branches to include in the voltage depression performance index (0 by default).
include only those with a nonzero rating.
include contingencies that create swingless islands (0 by default).
number of machine contingencies from overload ranking to include (>=0) (0 by default).

rval.description: MW mismatch threshold (>= 0.0) (Newton solution convergence tolerance, TOLN, by default).
small reactance threshold (THRSHZ <= RVAL(2) <= 0.005) (0.0005 by default).
percent of rating (0.0 <= RVAL(3) <= 200.0) (100.0 by default).
MW threshold for islanding contingencies (>= 0.0) (100.0 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
